ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the country belongs to */,
  "sub_region" TEXT /* Sub-region the country belongs to */,
  "income_group" TEXT /* Income group of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "happiness_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country from which the data was collected */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "life_ladder" REAL /* Life ladder score */,
  "log_gdp_per_capita" REAL /* Log GDP per capita */,
  "social_support" REAL /* Social support score */,
  "healthy_life_expectancy" REAL /* Healthy life expectancy at birth */,
  "freedom_to_make_life_choices" REAL /* Freedom to make life choices score */,
  "generosity" REAL /* Generosity score */,
  "perceptions_of_corruption" REAL /* Perceptions of corruption score */,
  "positive_affect" REAL /* Positive affect score */,
  "negative_affect" REAL /* Negative affect score */,
  "confidence_in_national_government" REAL /* Confidence in national government score */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_happiness_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country from which the data was collected */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "stat_type" TEXT /* Type of statistic (e.g., mean, standard deviation) */,
  "stat_value" REAL /* Value of the statistic */,
  "standard_error" REAL /* Standard error of the statistic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data that was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Date and time the data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES happiness_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id", "user_id")
)
